metadata.schema_based_on: Samsung Galaxy S23 Ultra / Nokia Database format
metadata.notes: Includes all major Huawei flagship and mid-range models from 2009 to 2024. Note: From 2019 onward, US trade sanctions affected Google services availability. From 2021, Huawei switched to HarmonyOS. Models from 2020+ generally do not include Google Play Store.
